calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Award For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER JOE GOODE PERFORMANCE GROUP's Motion For Award For Attorneys Fees And Costs.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed motion for award of attorney fees and costs is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER JOE GOODE PERFORMANCE GROUP's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioner Joe Goode Performance Group's unopposed Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RCE)
